Before I proceed, two quick clarifications so I don't make unwanted changes:

1) Is that the event you meant me to reschedule? (Yes / No — or give the correct event title/ID.)
2) What email should I use for the clinic so they can be notified? (I couldn't find a clinic contact in your contacts. If you prefer, I can add whatever clinic email you provide as a participant so the calendar notification will be sent.)

Also: do you want the standard calendar notification sent to participants (that will be sent automatically when I reschedule), or would you like a custom email message to be sent as well? If custom, please provide the message text you want.

If you confirm the event and give the clinic email (and whether you want a custom message), I'll:
- add the clinic email as a participant (so they receive notifications), and
- reschedule the event to start 2024-05-20 10:00 and keep the original duration,
- notify both you and the clinic.
